title: Cannot move out of borrowed content
explanation: This error occurs when you try to move a value while it is still borrowed. Rust's borrow checker ensures that references remain valid, so you cannot move a value out from under an active borrow.
error_message: error[E0505]: cannot move out of `s` because it is borrowed
tip: The borrow checker tracks when references are last used — a reference is considered dropped after its last use, not at end of scope.
